name: cc-statusline
description: Install or port a multi-line Claude Code statusLine dashboard read entirely from the JSON the CLI pipes on stdin (no external services, no polling): model + cwd, upstream git repo + branch, a context-window progress bar with token counts, and the 5-hour & 7-day subscription rate-limit windows with reset countdowns. Idempotent install that preserves existing settings; every segment degrades gracefully.
